NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFS MING BANG FENG, YUE PING KONG, RUI JIAN FENG, AND JIE SHI FENG (TRANSACTION ID # 78381459) FILED BY DEFENDANT KWON., ANSON HEARING SET FOR MAR-04-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT ANSON KWON'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFS MING BANG FENG, YUE PING KONG, RUI JIAN FENG, AND JIE SHI FENG IS GRANTED IN PART. EACH OF THE FOUR PLAINTIFFS MUST APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION ON ANY WEEKDAY CHOSEN BY KWON'S COUNSEL BETWEEN MARCH 11, 2026 AND MARCH 20, 2026 AND PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS REQUESTED IN THE NOTICES OF DEPOSITION THAT ARE IN THEIR POSSESSION, CUSTODY OR CONTROL. EACH OF THE FOUR PLAINTIFFS MUST PAY $800 IN REASONABLE MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR THEIR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THEIR DEPOSITIONS NO LATER THAN APRIL 13, 2026. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs Ming Bang Feng, Yue Ping Kong, Rui Jian Feng, And Jie Shi Feng
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ANSON KWON's Motion To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs Ming Bang Feng, Yue Ping Kong, Rui Jian Feng, And Jie Shi Feng.

Defendant Anson Kwon's motion to compel depositions of plaintiffs Ming Bang Feng, Yue Ping Kong, Rui Jian Feng, and Jie Shi Feng and for monetary sanctions is granted in part. Each of the four plaintiffs must appear for deposition on any weekday chosen by Kwon's counsel between March 11, 2026 and March 20, 2026 and produce all documents requested in the notices of deposition that are in their possession, custody or control. Each of the four plaintiffs must pay $800 in reasonable monetary sanctions for their failure to appear at their depositions no later than April 13, 2026.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
